job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

• We are seeking an experienced Server Lab Infrastructure Engineer to support and advance our internal lab and compute infrastructure as a shared resource across multiple technical teams (SW Enablement, System Enablement, Platform Enablement).
• Experienced Professionals Required Qualifications Preferred Skills You will own critical responsibilities spanning lab IT, networking, CI/CD systems, hardware board bring-up, server provisioning and maintenance, authentication services, and support escalations in both lab and public cloud environments.
• This role is central to ensuring reliable, secure compute environments — from bare metal server board bring-up through ongoing lab operations, cloud connectivity, and maintenance workflows.
• You will collaborate with procurement, datacenter partners, engineering teams, and internal users to enable high-performance development and validation workflows.
